javax.management/MBeanOperationInfo/ACTI.name: ACTION
javax.management/MBeanOperationInfo/ACTI.description:
Indicates that the operation is write-like: it has an effect but does
not return any information from the MBean.

info.excerpt:
Indicates that the operation is write-like: it has an effect but does
not return any information from the MBean.

javax.management/MBeanOperationInfo/ACTI.name: ACTION_INFO
javax.management/MBeanOperationInfo/ACTI.description:
Indicates that the operation is both read-like and write-like:
it has an effect, and it also returns information from the MBean.

info.excerpt:
Indicates that the operation is both read-like and write-like:
it has an effect, and it also returns information from the MBean.
